infobox.Ethnic groups (2022): 22.2% Bamileke , Bamun 16.4% Biu-Mandara 13.5% Shuwa Arab , Hausa and Kanuri 13.1% Beti - Bassa 12.0% Fulani 9.9% Tikar 9.8% Adamawa-Ubangi ( Mbum - Gbaya ) 4.6% Sawa people 4.3% Southwest Bantu 2.3% Pygmy peoples 3.8% others/foreigners
infobox.Religion (2022): 66.3% Christianity 30.6% Islam 1.3% traditional faiths 1.1% no religion 0.7% others
infobox.Government: Unitary presidential republic under a dictatorship
